description: The InspectorMemberActions component is used in inspectors to make the clicking on the left hand side button behavior that brings up a context menu.

fields.Member: The member to bring up a context menu with opens to break drives and a few other things.

methods.ResetField: Reset the field to the default value.
methods.BreakLinkDrive: Set the driver target driving this field from this field to null.
methods.OpenLinkDriveSource: Open the component driving this field.
methods.Normalize: Normalize this value if it's a set of more than 1 value.
methods.SetAllToAvg: Average the components of this value if it's a set of more than 1 value.
methods.SetAllToComponent: Set all the components of this value to X component.
methods.BakeBlendshape: Bake this blendshape if it's a blendshape.
methods.RemoveBlendshape: Remove this blendshape if it's a blendshape.
methods.SplitBlendshapeX: Split the blendshape along the X axis.
methods.SplitBlendshapeY: Split the blendshape along the Y axis.
methods.SplitBlendshapeZ: Split the blendshape along the Z axis.
